import React, { useState } from 'react'; import logo from '../Assets/Car 24 logo.png'; import CarSlider from '../components/CarSlider'; import './ComingSoon.css'; const ComingSoon = () => { const [bookingData, setBookingData] = useState({ pickupLocation: '', dropoffLocation: '', pickupDate: '', dropoffDate: '', email: '' }); const handleInputChange = (e) => { setBookingData({ ...bookingData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const handleNotify = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (bookingData.email) { alert(`Thank you! We'll notify you at ${bookingData.email} when we launch!`); setBookingData({ ...bookingData, email: '' }); } else { alert('Please enter your email address'); } }; const carImages = [ 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1605559424843-9e4c228bf1c2?w=800&h=600&fit=crop', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1552519507-da3b142c6e3d?w=800&h=600&fit=crop', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1583121274602-3e2820c69888?w=800&h=600&fit=crop', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1617531653332-bd46c24f2068?w=800&h=600&fit=crop', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1606664515524-ed2f786a0bd6?w=800&h=600&fit=crop', 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1614200187524-dc4b892acf16?w=800&h=600&fit=crop' ]; const features = [ { icon: '🚗', title: '500+ Cars', desc: 'Wide selection of vehicles' }, { icon: '💰', title: 'Best Prices', desc: 'No hidden charges' }, { icon: '🔑', title: 'Easy Booking', desc: 'Book in 3 simple steps' }, { icon: '🛡️', title: 'Fully Insured', desc: 'Complete protection' }, { icon: '⚡', title: 'Instant Pickup', desc: '24/7 availability' }, { icon: '🗺️', title: 'Unlimited KMs', desc: 'Drive without limits' } ]; return (
